import Trainer from "./Trainer";

const TrainersData = [

    new Trainer(
        1,
        "John Doe",
        "john@gmail.com",
        "9876543210",
        "Java FSD",
        "Spring Boot, React"
    ),

    new Trainer(
        2,
        "Emma Watson",
        "emma@gmail.com",
        "9876543211",
        ".NET FSD",
        "ASP.NET Core, Angular"
    ),

    new Trainer(
        3,
        "Robert Smith",
        "robert@gmail.com",
        "9876543212",
        "Python",
        "Django, Flask"
    )

];

export default TrainersData;
